compiled_state.title: record-test-status.sh: WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR set -> test-gate-status written to wrong directory
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: record-test-status.sh writes test-gate-status to a CWD-derived artifacts dir even when WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR is set. This causes harvest-worktree.sh to fail with test-gate-status not found in worktree isolation mode. The script should respect WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR like record-review.sh does with --findings-file. Workaround: use python to write the file directly. Impact: blocks per-worktree harvest without workaround.

comments.body: Investigation 2026-04-13: Code inspection shows get_artifacts_dir() in hooks/lib/deps.sh (line 267-270) correctly returns WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR when set. record-test-status.sh calls ARTIFACTS_DIR=$(get_artifacts_dir) and all code paths use this variable. All 9 attest tests pass. harvest-worktree.sh correctly passes WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR when calling record-test-status.sh --attest. Cannot reproduce the bug in current code. May have been fixed by prior commits. Escalated to user for closure decision.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Verification 2026-04-15: deps.sh get_artifacts_dir() (line 267-270) correctly returns WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR when set. record-test-status.sh uses ARTIFACTS_DIR=$(get_artifacts_dir) throughout. All 9 attest tests pass per prior investigation. Cannot reproduce bug in current code.
comments.author: Test
